theme_and_archetype.domain: AI Research Instrument / Multi-Model AI Dashboard
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Mathematica meets terminal UI meets advanced IDE. Serious, scientific, deeply analytical, and data-dense. Not a generic SaaS.

rules: Never use pure black (#000000), always use #030303 for the deepest void.
Primary UI is monochromatic (black, grey, white). Colors are strictly reserved for data visualization, active states, and syntax highlighting.
Avoid soft shadows. Use 1px sharp borders and precise inner glows for elevation.
Headings must use monospace for a scientific, terminal-first aesthetic.
Section overlines (H3) must be aggressively tracked out (uppercase, wide spacing).
Use IBM Plex Sans for long-form readability in chat outputs, but preserve JetBrains Mono for system UI and metrics.
Density is key. Use CSS Grid for the main workspace. No standard 'Bootstrap' columns.
Utilize 'Grid Borders' pattern: Use 1px borders (border-white/10) to delineate every panel, creating an IDE/Architectural feel.
Ensure the chat interface leaves adequate room for side-by-side (fan-out) comparisons.
Containers with borders MUST have internal padding to prevent content from touching edges.

surface_styles.interactive_cards: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 hover:border-white/30 transition-colors duration-200 cursor-pointer

byok_key_vault.design: Secure, terminal-like modal. Monospace inputs with blurred dots. Use 'emerald' micro-interactions for valid keys.
byok_key_vault.components: Shadcn Form, Input (customized to look like terminal prompts), Button.

model_inventory_browser.design: Data-dense bento grid. Display token limits, compute estimates, and cache states as raw data points. Use tiny inline bar charts for latency comparisons.
model_inventory_browser.components: Shadcn Table or custom CSS Grid with 1px borders.

multi_model_workspace.design: The core. For 'Fan-out', use a horizontal scroll snap container (Carousel) of chat panels. For 'Daisy-chain', stack nodes vertically with connecting 1px lines (like a graph pipeline).
multi_model_workspace.components: Markdown renderer, Code highlighting blocks (stark high-contrast theme), MathJax/KaTeX math blocks.

ptca_inference_engine_inspector.design: Highly visual dashboard. Use the 'ptca_rings_hero' media URL as an underlay or visual centerpiece. Surround it with raw data metrics (Φ, Ψ, Ω, Θ, Σ, Ε states).
ptca_inference_engine_inspector.components: Custom SVG or Recharts for data rings, overlaying the generated background.

detachable_agents_library.design: Card-based 'App Store' but styled like trading cards for AI models. Show 'FREE' badges as tiny pill components. 'Premium' locked features are greyed out with a subtle lock icon.
detachable_agents_library.components: Shadcn Card (heavily modified to be sharp, rounded-none, technical).

donation_cta.design: Subtle, non-blocking. Small amber-accented banner at the bottom left of the navigation sidebar. Text: 'Support this research instrument.'
donation_cta.components: Floating badge or sidebar footer item.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and instant. Change border opacities (e.g., border-white/10 to border-white/40). Do not use soft scaling/bouncing.
motion_and_interactions.loading_states: Avoid generic spinners. Use terminal-style ASCII loaders (e.g., [=   ], [==  ]) or rapid data-scrambling text effects.

iconography_and_assets.style: Regular or Light weight. Keep them precise and technical.

ptca_inspector_bg.description: Abstract 6 glowing intersecting rings. Use as background or visual asset in the PTCA Engine Inspector section.

app_background_texture.description: Minimalist grid pattern on obsidian black. Use as the global app body background with high opacity, or overlay behind the main workspace.

agents_library_header.description: Blue lines and dots data network. Use as a subtle header background overlay in the Detachable Agents Library.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text passes WCAG AA. Grey text (#A3A3A3) on #050505 passes.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, keys vault inputs, chat inputs, model selectors) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='chat-submit-btn'`).
accessibility_and_testing.focus_management: Ensure all inputs and buttons have distinct focus rings, prioritizing keyboard navigability.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT build a generic SaaS dashboard. This is a scientific instrument.
Install and use JetBrains Mono (via Google Fonts or similar) for headings and data elements. Use IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Implement the 'Control Room Grid'—use 1px white/10 borders to define panels instead of large drop shadows.
The Multi-model chat workspace must support Markdown, code blocks, and math rendering (MathJax/KaTeX).
For the 'Fan-out' feature, implement a horizontal scroll view (carousel) so users can compare multiple model responses side-by-side without vertical crowding.
In the PTCA Inspector, layer the provided 'ptca_inspector_bg' image behind the data metrics with an overlay to ensure text readability.
Apply `data-testid` to all forms, inputs, and primary CTAs.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout and heavily customize Shadcn components for inputs, dropdowns, and modals to strip out standard 'Vercel-like' styling and enforce the terminal look.
